title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you actually pulled it off. Guess they didn't
rig this machine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What're you gonna do with all of those anyway?
choice_data_list: Think you can take them all home?
Think you can take them all home?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? No, and I don't want them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Use 'em to decorate your office or something.
You're the one who won them.
